title: Trump proposes 20% toll on cargo through Strait of Hormuz; restarts Iran blockade
summary_full: The Strait of Hormuz is a major oil shipping route and the epicenter of the U.S. and Israel's ongoing war with Iran.
summary_public: The Strait of Hormuz is a major oil shipping route and the epicenter of the U.S. and Israel's ongoing war with Iran.
